error_signature: SVG images become blurry in mobile mode
title: Blurry SVG images in mobile mode
symptom: When viewing the web app on mobile, some SVG images appear blurry, while others do not. This issue does not occur when viewed in mobile mode from the Google Console.
applies_when: Using the Image element for SVGs
Viewing the web app on mobile
not_this_if: Issue does not occur on desktop or Google Console
root_cause: The Image element in the web app does not handle SVG images properly, leading to rendering issues that cause blurriness on mobile devices. This can happen due to scaling or resolution differences between the mobile display and the SVG rendering.
fix_steps: Replace the Image element with an HTML embed element
Paste the SVG code directly into the HTML embed
Save the changes and test the web app on mobile again
agent_instruction: Use an HTML embed to insert SVG images instead of the Image element.
